changes.value:
## What

Top-level wiring after the trait impl is reshaped. `agent.rs` constructs the Agent builder; `lib.rs` exports the public API.

Files:
- `claude-agent/src/agent.rs`
- `claude-agent/src/lib.rs`

## Branch state at task start

B8 (agent_trait_impl reshape) landed.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `cargo check -p claude-agent --lib` passes.
- [ ] One commit on `acp/0.11-rewrite`.

## Tests
- [ ] Inline tests pass. Integration tests covered by B10.

## Depends on
- (B8) ACP 0.11: claude-agent: agent_trait_impl.rs → builder/handler reshape.
ACP 0.11: claude-agent: agent.rs + lib.rs final integration
